name: Aspirin (Acetylsalicylic acid)
description: Ọgwụ mgbochi mkpali na-abụghị steroidal (NSAID) nwere ihe antiplatelet. Ọgwụgwọ ahịrị nke mbụ maka ọrịa a na-enyo enyo na ọ na-enyo enyo nnukwu akwara obi (ACS). Na-agbanwe agbanwe na-egbochi nchịkọta platelet - mmetụta na-adịru ogologo ndụ platelet (ụbọchị 7-10).
indications: A na-enyo enyo na nnukwu myocardial infarction (MI) --ta ozugbo
Angina na-adịghị akwụsi ike / nnukwu ọrịa obi
Ọrịa strok (ischemic - mgbe ewepụrụ ọbara ọgbụgba)
dose: ACS: 325 mg PO - CHEW (ewedala ya dum) ozugbo. Analgesic/antipyretic: 325-650 mg PO q4-6h PRN.
window: ACS: Nye ozugbo enwere ike --ata ozugbo na nrutuaka.
contraindications: Amara aspirin nfụkasị ma ọ bụ NSAID hypersensitivity
Ọbara ọgbụgba siri ike a na-achịkwaghị achịkwa -- aspirin na-akawanye ọbara ọgbụgba
warnings: Enyela ndị na-arịa ọbara ọgbụgba -- aspirin na-emebi ọrụ platelet na-eme ka ọbara ọgbụgba dịkwuo njọ.
Enyela ụmụaka <afọ 12 nwere ọrịa nje --ihe ize ndụ nke ọrịa Reye's syndrome.
Iwe iwe GI - were nri ma ọ bụrụ na ọ dịghị mkpa.

pediatric.dose: Analgesic / antipyretic: 10-15 mg / kg PO q4-6h (max 650 mg / dose). IHE: Contraindicated na viral ọrịa (Reye syndrome).
pediatric.note: Jiri acetaminophen (paracetamol) maka ahụ ọkụ na ụmụaka nwere ọrịa nje kama.

obstetric.note: Zere ime ime karịsịa n'ime ọnwa atọ nke atọ (mmechi ductus arteriosus na-akaghị aka). A na-eji obere dose (81mg) mee ihe maka mgbochi pre-eclampsia n'okpuru nduzi dọkịta naanị.
